name: zzbd_manager_write_section_record
description: zZbdManager::WriteSectionRecord formats '<section>/<token>' and appends the payload through the manager's index archive.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?WriteSectionRecord@zZbdManager@@QAEHPAUzZbdSectionCallbackCtx@@PBDPBXI@Z at 0x4c0630 still fails: 86 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, BN size 101 bytes, VC object symbol size 96 bytes.
The native smoke verifies formatted record path HUD/TimerData, payload forwarding, archive dirty flag, record count/capacity, and file offset/size.
